title: Static vs. Instance Members in Java
description: A visual comparison showing how static members belong to the class and are shared across all instances, while instance members belong to individual objects.
relationships: The Class contains and owns the Static Member
Object 1 and Object 2 are instances of the Class
Object 1 has its own copy of Instance Member
Object 2 has its own copy of Instance Member
Object 1 and Object 2 both share the single Static Member
